items.title: Separate company-law relief from criminal escalation
items.text: Where the sealed record mixes governance prejudice with digital-access allegations, prepare two tracks: company-law relief for governance prejudice and a separate cybercrime or prosecution brief only for anchored digital conduct.
items.source: UAE legal-layer operating rule grounded in primary UAE company and cyber laws

items.title: Use a sealed electronic-evidence brief
items.text: A UAE-facing complaint brief should identify the system, actor, dates, and anchor points, while preserving logs, credentials history, and company records for the competent authority or counsel.
items.source: Federal Decree-Law No. (34) of 2021 On Countering Rumors and Cybercrimes

items.title: RAKEZ-related company disputes require entity and file identification
items.text: When a matter touches a RAKEZ-linked company, the brief should identify the entity, file or license context, the rights affected, and the exact relief or referral requested from the competent office.
items.source: RAKEZ public service and contact channels
